modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error opening Zoom in smart classroom environment.

full_description_text: A field tech was trying to open Zoom in the smart classroom but got an error message. The error said zvideoApp.dll is not designed for Windows or has some kind of error. This issue is preventing the start of a Zoom session, which is also affecting D2L access.
short_description: Error opening Zoom in smart classroom environment.
description: A field tech was trying to open Zoom in the smart classroom but got an error message. The error said zvideoApp.dll is not designed for Windows or has some kind of error. This issue is preventing the start of a Zoom session, which is also affecting D2L access.
